scripts.lint: npm run lint:code && npm run lint:styles
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:infrastructure && npm run test:e2e:design-system
scripts.test:e2e:design-system: npm run build:design-system-preview && playwright test --config playwright.design-system.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:program: npm run build && playwright test program.spec.ts infrastructure.spec.ts --project=Chromium && npm run build:design-system-preview && playwright test --config playwright.design-system.config.ts accessibility.spec.ts --project=Chromium --grep "full-empty and error EventList"
scripts.evidence:design-system: npm run build:design-system-preview && WHO15_CAPTURE=1 playwright test --config playwright.design-system.config.ts evidence.spec.ts --project=Chromium
scripts.evidence:mobile-navigation: npm run build:design-system-preview && WHO17_CAPTURE=1 playwright test --config playwright.design-system.config.ts mobile-navigation.evidence.spec.ts --project=Chromium
scripts.evidence:home: npm run build && WHO18_CAPTURE=1 playwright test home.evidence.spec.ts --project=Chromium
scripts.evidence:program: npm run build && WHO20_CAPTURE=1 playwright test program.evidence.spec.ts --project=Chromium
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run check && npm run test:unit && npm run build && npm run build:design-system-preview
